title: Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers

seo.title: Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers: Authentic Turkish Recipe

seo.imageAlt: Authentic Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers grilled, served with rice and salad.
seo.imageCaption: Enjoy incredibly flavorful and juicy Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers from Turkey!

description: Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers are a beloved Turkish classic featuring succulent pieces of chicken marinated in a flavorful blend of yogurt, olive oil, and spices, then grilled to perfection. This recipe brings the authentic taste of Turkey to your home, promising juicy and tender chicken every time. It is a fantastic dish for family dinners or entertaining guests, offering a taste of the Mediterranean sun.

ingredients.notes: pul biber or Aleppo pepper, adjust to taste
if wooden, soak in water for 30 minutes

instructions.title: Prepare the Chicken
instructions.text: Cut the boneless, skinless chicken thighs into approximately 1.5-inch cubes. Ensure the pieces are roughly uniform in size for even cooking.

instructions.title: Make the Marinade
instructions.text: In a large bowl, combine the plain full-fat yogurt, olive oil, minced garlic, tomato paste, lemon juice, paprika, dried oregano, ground cumin, red pepper flakes, salt, and black pepper. Whisk everything together until you have a smooth and well-combined marinade.

instructions.title: Marinate the Chicken
instructions.text: Add the chicken cubes to the marinade bowl. Toss well to ensure all chicken pieces are thoroughly coated. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 2 hours, or ideally overnight, to allow the flavors to penetrate the chicken deeply.

instructions.title: Prepare Skewers and Grill
instructions.text: If using wooden skewers, soak them in water for at least 30 minutes to prevent burning. Preheat your grill to medium-high heat. Thread the marinated chicken pieces onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece for even cooking.

instructions.title: Grill the Chicken Skewers
instructions.text: Place the skewers on the preheated grill. Cook for 15-20 minutes, turning every 4-5 minutes, until the chicken is golden brown, cooked through, and the internal temperature reaches 165F (74C).

instructions.title: Rest and Serve
instructions.text: Once cooked, remove the Tavuk Sis from the grill and let them rest for 5 minutes before serving. This helps the juices redistribute, ensuring the chicken remains tender and moist. Serve hot with your favorite sides.

tips: For the most authentic flavor, allow the chicken to marinate overnight. The longer it marinates, the more tender and flavorful it will become.
If you dont have an outdoor grill, you can cook Tavuk Sis on a grill pan on the stovetop or bake them in the oven at 400F (200C) for 20-25 minutes.
Serve Tavuk Sis with traditional Turkish accompaniments like pilaf rice, fresh shepherd's salad (çoban salatası), lavash bread, and a dollop of cooling cacik (tzatziki).
To prevent wooden skewers from burning, ensure they are fully submerged in water for at least 30 minutes before threading the chicken.
article: Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers is a beloved Turkish Chicken Recipes dish enjoyed across Turkey. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
